description_long: This object is a classic submachine gun with a robust, rectangular black metal receiver and a long, cylindrical barrel. The stock and foregrip are made of wood, featuring a smooth, polished finish and a warm brown color. The weapon has a prominent trigger guard and a detachable box magazine located in front of the trigger. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with a simple post at the front and a rear aperture. The overall design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th-century firearms, with a utilitarian yet iconic silhouette. The combination of wood and metal materials gives it a sturdy and reliable appearance.
description: A classic submachine gun with a black metal receiver, brown wooden stock and foregrip, and a detachable box magazine. Features iron sights and a long cylindrical barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the wooden foregrip and stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, the wooden stock and foregrip, the box magazine, and the iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock, the rear sight aperture, and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the wooden stock, foregrip, and magazine clearly visible.
